headlineLabel: 2009. Twitter. Digital Communities, visible to technology. What’s happening right now? 2014. Slack. Organizations, visible to technology. What’s happening at work? 2026. Human Conversation. Real-world social networks, Real connection is still invisible to technology. What’s happening between us, around us, and within us? Complex systems need to see the reality about what’s happening — to know what to do next.

ledeText: Complex systems need to see the reality about what’s happening — to know what to do next.
storyMarkers: Relational data reveals the connection people feel with one another.
Modern technology can describe the individual in extraordinary detail.
A community can know every individual
For decades, technology pulled communication onto interfaces.
99.9% of communication technology puts an interface between us.
We help communities route the right conversations
A Human Conversationis wortha thousand taps.
Real conversations create the community graph.
Humans stay above the surface. AI handles underneath.
Imagine your life. 1% screen time. 99% human time.
